narrative: The loom falls quiet. Penelope says, “A signal is not a return; let the watch look before the hall believes.” Telemachus answers, “Then let a red sail call the harbor watch, and nothing more.” The custom remains outside canon until the creator decides.

utterances.text: A signal is not a return; let the watch look before the hall believes.
Then let a red sail call the harbor watch, and nothing more.

proposals.summary: Add an original red-sail signal to creator canon.

rule.description: In this creator canon, Ithacans treat a returning ship's red sail as a signal to begin the royal harbor watch.
